other_observers: Joel, Marcel, Renee, and David Such, Walter Szeliga; I found the bird.
description: Moderately large gull- about Herring Gull- sized but with an overall more delicate build. Overall very pale in comparison with all other gulls present (Mostly Ring-billed and Herring.) Body nearly white, back very pale gray, primaries essentially concolor with back and rest of wings. Close inspection showed that primaries had pale gray centers and white fringes. Reasonable primary projection, similar to Herring Gull. Bill not as robust as Herring Gull, overall pink with clean black tip. Head rounded, very slight smudging around dark eye.Behaviors: Preening & roosting with mixed flock of gulls on ice.Call: not heardPlumage: 2nd-Winter
photographer: Photographer: Bill Schmoker, Bill Schmoker, Bill Schmoker
